Please write a public response to this review:
Everything was fine, the goods were as expected and the recipient was very happy.

Dear valued customer,

Thank you so much for taking the time to leave us a positive review! We're delighted to hear that everything met your expectations and that the recipient was very happy with the goods. We take pride in the quality of our products and our customer service, and it's rewarding to see such feedback.

Should you need anything else or have any further feedback, please don't hesitate to reach out. We look forward to serving you again in the future!

Warm regards,

[Your Company's Customer Service Team]

[cool and young slang but not to cringe for other people, don’t use word thrilled]These are PERFECT. They’re actually beautiful. I couldn’t be more happy with them and I’m SO excited to give them to my husband for Christmas!

Hey there!

Absolutely hyped to hear you’ve found the perfect match with your pick – calling them beautiful just made our day! 🌟 Your excitement is totally contagious, and we can't wait for you to share with us your husband's reaction when he unwrapped the surprise at Christmas.

Szia!

Teljesen odavagyunk, hogy megtaláltad a tökéletes darabot a választásoddal – hogy gyönyörűnek nevezted őket, egész napunkat feldobta! 🌟 A lelkesedésed ragadós, és alig várjuk, hogy megoszd velünk, milyen volt a férjed reakciója, amikor karácsonykor kibontotta a meglepetést.

Minden boldog pillanatot kívánunk, amikor átadod neki. Ha bármi másra van szükséged, csak egy gyors üzenetre vagyunk.

Boldog ünnepeket és viszlát később!

[cool and young slang but not to cringe for other people, react to the life size painted kingfisher bird miniature figure that Larry the reviewer shared with us ]
Please write a public response to this review in english:

Really nice print quality, size is large and will paint up nicely. My wife will love it as a first player token for wingspan!

Hey Larry!

Super glad to hear the kingfisher bird miniature is scoring high on quality and size – sounds like it's ready to bring its A-game to paint town. 🎨 We're buzzing with excitement thinking about how it'll be the star player in your Wingspan sessions! 

Fingers crossed your wife digs her new token. Thanks for sharing the love, and here's to many more awesome game nights!

Game on,

[Your Board Game Buddies]

[cool and young slang but not to cringe for other people, use the word: thrilled to react to the photo of the life size kingfisher bird miniature figure that Larry the reviewer painted after purchase and shared the photo with us ]
Please write a public response to this review in english:

Really nice print quality, size is large and will paint up nicely. My wife will love it as a first player token for wingspan!

Hey Larry!

Totally stoked to see that the kingfisher bird miniature is a hit with its prime print quality and size! Can't wait to see how it turns out once you've worked your paint magic on it. 🖌️

We're all about those personal touches, and it sounds like your wife's going to have the coolest first player token for Wingspan ever. Thanks for letting us in on this epic upgrade – we're all about that next-level game play.

Keep those creative vibes flowing,

[Your Crafty Game Crew]

fordítsd le angolra:

Teljességgel sokkolódtunk, amikor megláttuk a madarunk kifestett példányát! Remélem nem zavar, ha felhasználjuk a jövőben a termékképek között!
We were totally blown away when we saw our bird painted up! Hope you don't mind if we use it in our future product photos!

Fordítsd magyarra:

Hey Larry!

Super glad to hear the kingfisher bird miniature is scoring high on quality and size.We were totally blown away when we saw our bird painted up! 🎨🖌️ Hope you don’t mind if we use it in our future product photos!
We’re all about those personal touches, and it sounds like your wife’s going to have the coolest first player token for Wingspan ever. Thanks for letting us in on this epic upgrade – we’re all about that next-level game play.

Fingers crossed your wife digs her new token. Thanks for sharing the love, and here’s to many more awesome game nights!

Game on,

Szia Larry!

Nagyon örülünk, hogy a jégmadár miniatűr figuránk a minőség és méret tekintetében is magas pontszámot ért el. Teljesen elámultunk, amikor megláttuk, hogy már kifestve milyen csodás a madárunk! 🎨🖌️ Reméljük, nem bánod, ha felhasználjuk a festett verziót a jövőbeni termékfotóink között!
Nagyra értékeljük az egyéni stílust, és úgy tűnik, hogy a feleséged a Wingspan játékban a legmenőbb első játékos jelölő birtokosa lesz. Köszönjük, hogy beavattál minket ebbe az epikus fejlesztésbe – odavagyunk az innovatív játékélményért.

Drukkolunk, hogy a feleséged is oda lesz az új jelölőjéért. Köszi, hogy megosztottad velünk a szeretetet, és íme, egy pohárköszöntő még sok csodás játékéjszakához!

Tovább a játékokhoz,

[cool and young slang but not to cringe for other people, don’t use word thrilled, in english]
Please write review:

The fish broke off during shipping. After contacting the seller he shipped a new one and modified the model and packaging to make it less prone to breaking. Thank you!

Hey there,

Bummer about the initial shipping snag with the fish, but huge props to the seller for stepping up quick with a fix. They sent out a new one and even tweaked the model plus the packaging to dodge future breakage. Big thanks for that smooth customer care!

Cheers to the solid service!

[Your Grateful Customer]

[cool and young slang but not to cringe for other people, don’t use word thrilled, mention that probably not all card protectors are the same sized, probably their was a bit bigger than ours]
Please write a public response to this review:

Overall the product was nice, it fit all the pieces well, if there are any complaints it would be that I wish the card holder was slightly larger so it would accommodate the cards with card protectors.

Hey there!

Thanks for the props on the product – love that it's fitting all the pieces snugly! We hear you on the card holder size. Seems like card protectors can really be all over the map in size, and maybe yours are on the larger side. We're taking note for future designs to make sure everyone's decked out cards can chill comfortably in our holders.

Appreciate your feedback big time; it helps us level up!

Keep gaming in style,

[Your Dev Team]

Magyarul

Hey there!

Thanks for the props on the product – love that it’s fitting all the pieces snugly! We hear you on the card holder size. Seems like card protectors can really be all over the map in size, and maybe yours are on the larger side. We’re taking note for future designs to make sure everyone’s decked out cards can chill comfortably in our holders.

Appreciate your feedback big time; it helps us level up!

Keep gaming in style,

Szia!

Köszönjük a pozitív visszajelzést a termékünkre – szuper, hogy minden darab tökéletesen passzol! Észrevettük a kártyatartó méretével kapcsolatos megjegyzésedet. Úgy tűnik, a kártyavédők méretei tényleg elég változatosak lehetnek, és lehet, hogy a tiéd egy kicsit nagyobb méretű. Megjegyzésül vesszük a jövőbeli terveink során, hogy mindenki kártyái kényelmesen elférjenek a tartóinkban.

Nagyon hálásak vagyunk a visszajelzésért; rengeteget segít nekünk a fejlődésben!

Stílusos játékot továbbra is,

[A Fejlesztőcsapatod]
